preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username = 'analyst' OR email = 'analyst@finvault.com'

changeSet.author: finvault

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username = 'analyst'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM roles WHERE name = 'ROLE_ANALYST'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_roles ur JOIN users u ON ur.user_id = u.id JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.username = 'analyst' AND r.name = 'ROLE_ANALYST'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO user_roles (user_id, role_id) SELECT u.id, r.id FROM users u, roles r WHERE u.username = 'analyst' AND r.name = 'ROLE_ANALYST'

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'analyst') AND role_id = (SELECT id FROM roles WHERE name = 'ROLE_ANALYST')

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username = 'viewer' OR email = 'viewer@finvault.com'

changeSet.author: finvault

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username = 'viewer'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM roles WHERE name = 'ROLE_VIEWER'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_roles ur JOIN users u ON ur.user_id = u.id JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.username = 'viewer' AND r.name = 'ROLE_VIEWER'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO user_roles (user_id, role_id) SELECT u.id, r.id FROM users u, roles r WHERE u.username = 'viewer' AND r.name = 'ROLE_VIEWER'

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'viewer') AND role_id = (SELECT id FROM roles WHERE name = 'ROLE_VIEWER')

changeSet.author: finvault

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username = 'admin'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM financial_records WHERE created_by_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'admin') AND date BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-06-30' AND description IN ( 'Monthly salary - January', 'Monthly salary - February', 'Monthly salary - March', 'Monthly salary - April', 'Monthly salary - May', 'Monthly salary - June', 'Website redesign project for client', 'Logo design for startup', 'Dividend payment from ETF portfolio', 'Tax refund for overpaid withholding', 'Monthly apartment rent - January', 'Monthly apartment rent - February', 'Monthly apartment rent - March', 'Monthly apartment rent - April', 'Monthly apartment rent - May', 'Monthly apartment rent - June', 'Weekly grocery shopping at Costco', 'Organic produce and pantry restock', 'Monthly grocery run plus household supplies', 'Electric bill - January', 'Internet and phone bundle', 'Electric bill - March (winter usage)', 'Monthly transit pass', 'Uber rides to client meetings', 'Dental cleaning and checkup', 'Prescription medication refill', 'Annual streaming service bundle', 'Concert tickets', 'Online course - Cloud Architecture', 'Quarterly health insurance premium' )

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM financial_records WHERE created_by_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'admin') AND date BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-06-30' AND description IN ( 'Monthly salary - January', 'Monthly salary - February', 'Monthly salary - March', 'Monthly salary - April', 'Monthly salary - May', 'Monthly salary - June', 'Website redesign project for client', 'Logo design for startup', 'Dividend payment from ETF portfolio', 'Tax refund for overpaid withholding', 'Monthly apartment rent - January', 'Monthly apartment rent - February', 'Monthly apartment rent - March', 'Monthly apartment rent - April', 'Monthly apartment rent - May', 'Monthly apartment rent - June', 'Weekly grocery shopping at Costco', 'Organic produce and pantry restock', 'Monthly grocery run plus household supplies', 'Electric bill - January', 'Internet and phone bundle', 'Electric bill - March (winter usage)', 'Monthly transit pass', 'Uber rides to client meetings', 'Dental cleaning and checkup', 'Prescription medication refill', 'Annual streaming service bundle', 'Concert tickets', 'Online course - Cloud Architecture', 'Quarterly health insurance premium' )
